message:
feat: VOI-optimal capture scheduler for principled pane polling (wa-1qz1.3)

Value-of-Information scheduler with categorical belief distributions
over pane states, entropy drift tracking, backpressure cost integration,
and optimal polling order. Integrates with bayesian_ledger PaneState. 39 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
